title: Sistema Lunch Snack Attack Duo Lunch Box | 975 ml | BPA-Free | Assorted Colours
features: Multi-compartment lunch box designed for lunch on the go
Flexible seal helps keep food fresh
Featuring distinctive Sistema KLIP IT easy locking clips
Dishwasher (top rack only), microwave, fridge and freezer safe
Designed and made in New Zealand, phthalate and BPA free
description: From the manufacturer Food storage solutions for people on the go The Sistema TO GO range is ideal for busy lifestyles, featuring a selection of food storage containers designed for keeping salads, sandwiches and other food items fresh on the go, with multi compartments to keep ingredients separated until you are ready to eat. Whether you are taking lunch to the work place, school or trips to the park, we have everything covered for your food on the go needs with lunch boxes, snack pots and cutlery. Control of diet/portion control Aware of what you are eating Restricts impulse purchases Keeps you away from comfort food Stylish food storage solutions for busy people on the go Why You'll Love It Keep Food Fresh Multi-compartments keep your ingredients separated and fresh until you are ready to eat. Healthy Eating For Any Occasion Lunch at the work place, school or trips to the park, there is a Sistema TO GO container to suit your needs. Microwave Safe, Dishwasher Safe & Freezer Safe For easy clean up, Sistema TO GO food storage containers and lids can go in the dishwasher (top rack). They can also be stored in the freezer and easily microwaved to defrost and reheat. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2017L41815/1, issued in 2018).
